name: Bangaladumpa Vepudu
steps: Crackle mustard seeds and chana dal in hot oil, then add curry leaves.
Add the potato cubes and turmeric, and toss to coat.
Fry uncovered on medium heat, turning occasionally, until the edges crisp and brown.
Sprinkle chilli powder, coriander powder and salt.
Toss for two more minutes until every cube is crusty and serve with rice and pappu.
